# RoxyAPI Go SDK - Full Method Reference

The official Go SDK for RoxyAPI. Astrology, Vedic astrology, numerology, tarot, human design, forecasting and more, one API key, fully typed, generated from the OpenAPI spec.

## How to call

```go
import roxyapi "github.com/RoxyAPI/sdk-go"

roxy, err := roxyapi.NewRoxy(os.Getenv("ROXYAPI_KEY"))
resp, err := roxy.Astrology.GetDailyHoroscope(context.Background(), "aries", nil)
// resp.JSON200 holds the parsed body on a 2xx; a 4xx or 5xx is returned as *roxyapi.RoxyError.
```

Methods are grouped by domain on the value returned by `NewRoxy` and named for the spec operation id below (PascalCase). The signature order is `(ctx, pathParams..., params, body)`: `params` is a nilable `*XxxParams` carrying query parameters (including `Lang`); endpoints with no query parameters drop it. POST endpoints take a typed `body` (`roxyapi.<Method>JSONRequestBody`) last. Read `AGENTS.md` for request construction (the `Date` and `Ptr` helpers, the timezone union, multi language) and error handling.

This file is the method INDEX (operation id, HTTP method, path, summary). For request and response FIELD names, use the typed Go structs: editor autocomplete, https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/RoxyAPI/sdk-go, or the JSON shapes at https://roxyapi.com/api-reference.

<!-- BEGIN:METHODS -->
## Western Astrology - `roxy.Astrology`

Western astrology API for natal birth charts, daily, weekly, and monthly horoscopes with unique content per sign, syn...

- `calculateArabicLots` - POST `/astrology/arabic-lots` - Arabic lots calculator - seven Hermetic parts including Part of Fortune and Spirit
- `detectAspectPatterns` - POST `/astrology/aspect-patterns` - Detect aspect patterns - Grand Trine, Kite, T-Square, Grand Cross, Yod, Mystic Rectangle, Stellium
- `calculateAspects` - POST `/astrology/aspects` - Calculate planetary aspects - Aspect finder for any date and time
- `generateAsteroids` - POST `/astrology/asteroids` - Asteroid goddesses calculator - Ceres, Pallas, Juno, and Vesta natal positions
- `generateAstrocartography` - POST `/astrology/astrocartography` - Astrocartography map - planetary lines and relocation calculator
- `calculateCompatibility` - POST `/astrology/compatibility-score` - Compatibility Score. Relationship compatibility analysis with category breakdown
- `generateCompositeChart` - POST `/astrology/composite-chart` - Composite Chart - Midpoint relationship chart with interpretations
- `generateFixedStars` - POST `/astrology/fixed-stars` - Fixed stars and star conjunctions calculator - Regulus, Spica, Algol natal report
- `getDailyHoroscope` - GET `/astrology/horoscope/{sign}/daily` - Daily horoscope by zodiac sign - Transit-based forecast with house activations
- `getMonthlyHoroscope` - GET `/astrology/horoscope/{sign}/monthly` - Monthly horoscope by zodiac sign - 30-day transit forecast with key dates
- `getWeeklyHoroscope` - GET `/astrology/horoscope/{sign}/weekly` - Weekly horoscope by zodiac sign - 7-day transit forecast
- `calculateHouses` - POST `/astrology/houses` - Calculate house cusps - House system calculator with comparison
- `generateLilith` - POST `/astrology/lilith` - Black Moon Lilith calculator - mean and true lunar apogee in the natal chart
- `generateLocalSpace` - POST `/astrology/local-space` - Local space astrology map - Directional planetary compass lines
- `generateLunarReturn` - POST `/astrology/lunar-return` - Lunar Return Chart - Monthly emotional forecast with Moon cycle chart
- `getMoonCalendar` - GET `/astrology/moon-phase/calendar/{year}/{month}` - Get lunar calendar - Moon phases for entire month
- `getCurrentMoonPhase` - GET `/astrology/moon-phase/current` - Get current moon phase - Lunar phase calculator with zodiac sign
- `getUpcomingMoonPhases` - GET `/astrology/moon-phase/upcoming` - Get upcoming moon phases - Next new moon, full moon, quarters
- `generateNatalChart` - POST `/astrology/natal-chart` - Generate natal chart - Birth chart calculator API with houses and aspects
- `listPlanetMeanings` - GET `/astrology/planet-meanings` - Get all planet meanings - Complete astrology planet interpretations list
- `getPlanetMeaning` - GET `/astrology/planet-meanings/{id}` - Get planet meaning details - Complete astrology planet interpretation
- `generatePlanetaryReturn` - POST `/astrology/planetary-returns` - Planetary Return Chart - Saturn return, Jupiter return, and inner planet cycles
- `getPlanetaryPositions` - POST `/astrology/planets` - Get planetary positions - Ephemeris calculator for all planets
- `generateProfections` - POST `/astrology/profections` - Annual profections calculator - lord of the year and yearly time lord by age
- `generateProgressions` - POST `/astrology/progressions` - Secondary progressions calculator - progressed chart, progressed Sun and Moon
- `generateRelocationChart` - POST `/astrology/relocation-chart` - Generate relocation chart - Relocated birth chart calculator with shifted houses and angles
- `listZodiacSigns` - GET `/astrology/signs` - Get all zodiac signs - Complete zodiac signs list with dates and elements
- `getZodiacSign` - GET `/astrology/signs/{id}` - Get zodiac sign details - Complete astrology sign profile with personality traits
- `generateSolarArc` - POST `/astrology/solar-arc` - Solar arc directions calculator - directed chart at one degree per year
- `generateSolarReturn` - POST `/astrology/solar-return` - Solar Return Chart - Annual birthday forecast with relocated chart
- `calculateSynastry` - POST `/astrology/synastry` - Calculate synastry - Relationship compatibility analysis API
- `calculateTransitAspects` - POST `/astrology/transit-aspects` - Transit Aspects - Detailed transit-to-natal aspect analysis with interpretations
- `calculateTransits` - POST `/astrology/transits` - Calculate planetary transits - Current transits with natal chart comparison

## Vedic Astrology - `roxy.VedicAstrology`

Vedic astrology (Jyotish) and KP API for kundli generation with 15 divisional charts (D1-D60), Ashtakoot Gun Milan ku...

- `calculateAshtakavarga` - POST `/vedic-astrology/ashtakavarga` - Get Ashtakavarga (planetary strength) analysis - Ashtakavarga Calculator API
- `calculateDrishti` - POST `/vedic-astrology/aspects` - Get planetary aspects (Drishti) - Mutual aspects between all planets
- `getLunarAspects` - POST `/vedic-astrology/aspects/lunar` - Monthly Lunar Aspects - Moon aspect events with all planets for a month
- `getMonthlyAspects` - POST `/vedic-astrology/aspects/monthly` - Monthly Planetary Aspects - Major and minor aspect events for a month
- `generateBirthChart` - POST `/vedic-astrology/birth-chart` - Get birth chart (D1 Rashi chart) - Kundli Calculator API
- `calculateGunMilan` - POST `/vedic-astrology/compatibility` - Calculate compatibility score - Gun Milan API (Ashtakoot Matching)
- `getCurrentDasha` - POST `/vedic-astrology/dasha/current` - Get current Mahadasha, Antardasha, Pratyantardasha - Dasha Calculator API
- `getMajorDashas` - POST `/vedic-astrology/dasha/major` - Get all 9 Mahadasha periods (120-year cycle)
- `getSubDashas` - POST `/vedic-astrology/dasha/sub/{mahadasha}` - Get all Antardashas (sub-periods) for a specific Mahadasha
- `generateDivisionalChart` - POST `/vedic-astrology/divisional-chart` - Get divisional chart (Varga) - D2 to D60 Calculator
- `checkKalsarpaDosha` - POST `/vedic-astrology/dosha/kalsarpa` - Check Kalsarpa Dosha - Kalsarpa Yoga Calculator API
- `checkManglikDosha` - POST `/vedic-astrology/dosha/manglik` - Check Manglik Dosha - Mangal Dosha Calculator API
- `checkSadhesati` - POST `/vedic-astrology/dosha/sadhesati` - Check Sadhesati - Sade Sati Calculator API (Saturn Transit)
- `getEclipticCrossings` - POST `/vedic-astrology/ecliptic-crossings` - Ecliptic Crossings - When planets cross the ecliptic plane
- `getKpAyanamsa` - GET `/vedic-astrology/kp/ayanamsa` - Get KP-Newcomb ayanamsa - Dynamic daily calculation
- `generateKpChart` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/chart` - Generate complete KP birth chart
- `getKpCusps` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/cusps` - Get KP Placidus house cusps with sub-lords
- `getKpPlanets` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/planets` - Get KP planetary positions with sub-lords
- `getKpPlanetsInterval` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/planets-interval` - Get KP planets at time intervals
- `getKpRasiChanges` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/rasi-changes` - Find KP rasi ingress times
- `getKpRulingPlanets` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/ruling-planets` - Get KP ruling planets with optional significators
- `getKpRulingInterval` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/ruling-planets-interval` - Get KP ruling planets with significators at intervals
- `getKpSublordChanges` - POST `/vedic-astrology/kp/sublord-changes` - Find KP sublord changes
- `listNakshatras` - GET `/vedic-astrology/nakshatras` - List all 27 Nakshatras - Lunar Mansions Reference
- `getNakshatra` - GET `/vedic-astrology/nakshatras/{id}` - Get Nakshatra by ID - Lunar Mansion Detail
- `generateNavamsa` - POST `/vedic-astrology/navamsa` - Get Navamsa chart (D9) - Marriage Compatibility Calculator
- `getBasicPanchang` - POST `/vedic-astrology/panchang/basic` - Get basic Panchang - Tithi Nakshatra Yoga Karana Calculator
- `getChoghadiya` - POST `/vedic-astrology/panchang/choghadiya` - Get Choghadiya - 8 Muhurta divisions of day and night
- `getDetailedPanchang` - POST `/vedic-astrology/panchang/detailed` - Get detailed Panchang with Rahu Kaal, Yamaganda, Gulika
- `getHora` - POST `/vedic-astrology/panchang/hora` - Get Hora - 24 Planetary Hours (12 day + 12 night)
- `calculateParallels` - POST `/vedic-astrology/parallels` - Declination Parallels - Planets at same or opposite declination
- `getMonthlyParallels` - POST `/vedic-astrology/parallels/monthly` - Monthly Declination Parallels - Parallel and contraparallel events for a month
- `getPlanetPositions` - POST `/vedic-astrology/planetary-positions` - Get planetary positions - Graha Positions API
- `getMonthlyEphemeris` - POST `/vedic-astrology/planetary-positions/monthly` - Monthly Ephemeris - Daily sidereal planetary positions for a month
- `listRashis` - GET `/vedic-astrology/rashis` - List all 12 Rashis - Vedic Zodiac Signs Reference
- `getRashi` - GET `/vedic-astrology/rashis/{id}` - Get Rashi by ID - Vedic Zodiac Sign Detail
- `calculateShadbala` - POST `/vedic-astrology/shadbala` - Get Shadbala (six-fold planetary strength) analysis - Shadbala Calculator API
- `calculateTransit` - POST `/vedic-astrology/transit` - Transit Analysis - Compare current planets to natal chart (Gochar)
- `getMonthlyTransits` - POST `/vedic-astrology/transit/monthly` - Monthly Transit - Planetary sign changes for an entire month
- `getUpagrahaPositions` - POST `/vedic-astrology/upagraha` - Get upagraha (sub-planet) positions - Upagraha Calculator API
- `listYogas` - GET `/vedic-astrology/yoga` - List all planetary yogas - 300+ Vedic Yoga Glossary
- `detectYogas` - POST `/vedic-astrology/yoga/detect` - Detect classical Vedic yogas in a birth chart
- `getYoga` - GET `/vedic-astrology/yoga/{id}` - Get yoga details by ID - Vedic Yoga Glossary Entry

## Numerology - `roxy.Numerology`

Numerology API to calculate life path, expression, soul urge, personality, and maturity numbers, with Pinnacle and Ch...

- `calculateBirthDay` - POST `/numerology/birth-day` - Calculate Birth Day number - Special talents from day of birth
- `calculateBridgeNumbers` - POST `/numerology/bridge` - Calculate Bridge Numbers - Harmonize different aspects of personality
- `calculateBusinessName` - POST `/numerology/business-name` - Business name numerology - Chaldean brand name analysis and lucky numbers
- `calculateChaldean` - POST `/numerology/chaldean` - Chaldean numerology name reading - Destiny, compound number, planetary ruler
- `generateNumerologyChart` - POST `/numerology/chart` - Generate Complete Numerology Chart - Full profile analysis
- `calculateNumCompatibility` - POST `/numerology/compatibility` - Calculate Compatibility - Relationship dynamics between two people
- `getCompoundNumber` - GET `/numerology/compound-number/{number}` - Compound number meaning - Cheiro Chaldean interpretation 10 to 52
- `getDailyNumber` - POST `/numerology/daily` - Get daily numerology number - Number of the Day with interpretation
- `calculateDual` - POST `/numerology/dual` - Dual numerology - Pythagorean and Chaldean name numbers in one call
- `calculateExpression` - POST `/numerology/expression` - Calculate Expression number - Natural talents and life goals
- `checkKarmicDebt` - POST `/numerology/karmic-debt` - Detect Karmic Debt numbers - Past life challenges (13, 14, 16, 19)
- `analyzeKarmicLessons` - POST `/numerology/karmic-lessons` - Analyze Karmic Lessons - Life lessons from missing numbers
- `calculateLifePath` - POST `/numerology/life-path` - Calculate Life Path number - Most important numerology calculation
- `calculateMaturity` - POST `/numerology/maturity` - Calculate Maturity number - Who you become in later life
- `getNumberMeaning` - GET `/numerology/meanings/{number}` - Get Number Meaning - Interpretation for any number 1-9, 11, 22, 33
- `calculatePersonalDay` - POST `/numerology/personal-day` - Calculate Personal Day - Daily personalized numerology forecast
- `calculatePersonalMonth` - POST `/numerology/personal-month` - Calculate Personal Month - Monthly numerology forecast
- `calculatePersonalYear` - POST `/numerology/personal-year` - Calculate Personal Year - Annual cycle and forecast for current year
- `calculatePersonality` - POST `/numerology/personality` - Calculate Personality number - How others perceive you
- `calculateSoulUrge` - POST `/numerology/soul-urge` - Calculate Soul Urge number - Inner motivations and desires

## Tarot - `roxy.Tarot`

Tarot reading API with the complete 78-card Rider-Waite-Smith deck and card meanings for love, career, health, and sp...

- `listCards` - GET `/tarot/cards` - List all 78 tarot cards
- `getCard` - GET `/tarot/cards/{id}` - Get detailed tarot card information
- `getDailyCard` - POST `/tarot/daily` - Get daily tarot card reading
- `drawCards` - POST `/tarot/draw` - Draw random tarot cards with reproducible results
- `castCareerSpread` - POST `/tarot/spreads/career` - Career Spread (7 cards)
- `castCelticCross` - POST `/tarot/spreads/celtic-cross` - Celtic Cross Spread (10 cards)
- `castCustomSpread` - POST `/tarot/spreads/custom` - Custom Spread Builder
- `castLoveSpread` - POST `/tarot/spreads/love` - Love Spread (5 cards)
- `castThreeCard` - POST `/tarot/spreads/three-card` - Three-Card Spread: Past, Present, Future
- `castYesNo` - POST `/tarot/yes-no` - Get yes/no answer to your question

## Human Design - `roxy.HumanDesign`

Generate the full Human Design bodygraph from a birth moment: type, strategy, inner authority, profile, definition, i...

- `generateBodygraph` - POST `/human-design/bodygraph` - Generate full Human Design bodygraph - Type, authority, profile, centers, channels, gates
- `calculateCenters` - POST `/human-design/centers` - Calculate the nine Human Design centers
- `getCenter` - GET `/human-design/centers/{id}` - Look up a Human Design center by id
- `calculateChannels` - POST `/human-design/channels` - Calculate the defined Human Design channels
- `calculateConnection` - POST `/human-design/connection` - Calculate Human Design connection chart - Two-person composite bodygraph compatibility
- `calculateGates` - POST `/human-design/gates` - Calculate the 26 Human Design gate activations
- `getGate` - GET `/human-design/gates/{number}` - Look up a Human Design gate by number
- `calculatePenta` - POST `/human-design/penta` - Calculate Human Design Penta - Small-group BG5 operating system for three to five people
- `calculateProfile` - POST `/human-design/profile` - Calculate the Human Design profile and line keynotes
- `generateTransit` - POST `/human-design/transit` - Generate Human Design transit overlay - Current planetary activations on a natal bodygraph
- `calculateType` - POST `/human-design/type` - Calculate Human Design type, authority and profile
- `calculateVariables` - POST `/human-design/variables` - Calculate Human Design Variables - The four arrows and Color, Tone, Base substructure

## Forecast - `roxy.Forecast`

Merge upcoming transit aspects, sign ingresses, retrograde stations, new and full moons, biorhythm critical days, and...

- `generateDigest` - POST `/forecast/digest` - Forecast digest - Pre-summarized next 24h, 7d, 30d, and 90d rollups
- `findSignificantDates` - POST `/forecast/significant-dates` - Significant dates - High-significance cross-domain forecast highlights
- `forecastSolarReturn` - POST `/forecast/solar-return` - Solar return chart - Annual birthday forecast chart for a single subject
- `generateTimeline` - POST `/forecast/timeline` - Cross-domain forecast timeline - Transits, ingresses, stations, dasha changes, critical days
- `forecastTransits` - POST `/forecast/transits` - Western astrology forecast - aspects, ingresses, stations, eclipses, moon phases

## Biorhythm - `roxy.Biorhythm`

The most complete biorhythm API: 10 cycle types across 3 primary (physical, emotional, intellectual), 4 secondary (in...

- `calculateBioCompatibility` - POST `/biorhythm/compatibility` - Calculate compatibility - Biorhythm alignment between two people
- `getCriticalDays` - POST `/biorhythm/critical-days` - Find critical days - Zero crossing detection for any date range
- `getDailyBiorhythm` - POST `/biorhythm/daily` - Get daily biorhythm - Seeded reading for daily check-in features
- `getForecast` - POST `/biorhythm/forecast` - Get biorhythm forecast - Multi-day cycle predictions with best and worst days
- `getPhases` - POST `/biorhythm/phases` - Get phase info - Lightweight cycle status for dashboards and widgets
- `getReading` - POST `/biorhythm/reading` - Get biorhythm reading - Complete cycle analysis for any date

## I-Ching - `roxy.Iching`

I-Ching oracle API with all 64 hexagrams, 384 changing lines, 8 trigrams, and modern interpretations for love, career...

- `castReading` - GET `/iching/cast` - Cast an I-Ching reading
- `getDailyHexagram` - POST `/iching/daily` - Get daily I-Ching hexagram
- `castDailyReading` - POST `/iching/daily/cast` - Cast daily I-Ching reading with changing lines
- `listHexagrams` - GET `/iching/hexagrams` - List all 64 hexagrams
- `lookupHexagram` - GET `/iching/hexagrams/lookup` - Lookup hexagram by line pattern
- `getRandomHexagram` - GET `/iching/hexagrams/random` - Get a random hexagram
- `getHexagram` - GET `/iching/hexagrams/{number}` - Get hexagram by number
- `listTrigrams` - GET `/iching/trigrams` - List all 8 trigrams
- `getTrigram` - GET `/iching/trigrams/{id}` - Get trigram by number or name

## Crystals and Healing Stones - `roxy.Crystals`

Crystal healing API with 80 healing crystals and gemstones and their spiritual, emotional, and physical properties

- `listCrystals` - GET `/crystals` - List All Crystals
- `getBirthstones` - GET `/crystals/birthstone/{month}` - Birthstone Crystals by Month
- `getCrystalsByChakra` - GET `/crystals/chakra/{chakra}` - Crystals by Chakra
- `listCrystalColors` - GET `/crystals/colors` - List Crystal Colors
- `getDailyCrystal` - POST `/crystals/daily` - Daily Crystal
- `getCrystalsByElement` - GET `/crystals/element/{element}` - Crystals by Element
- `getCrystalPairings` - GET `/crystals/pairings/{id}` - Crystal Pairings
- `listCrystalPlanets` - GET `/crystals/planets` - List Crystal Planets
- `getRandomCrystal` - GET `/crystals/random` - Random Crystal
- `searchCrystals` - GET `/crystals/search` - Search Crystals
- `getCrystalsByZodiac` - GET `/crystals/zodiac/{sign}` - Crystals by Zodiac Sign
- `getCrystal` - GET `/crystals/{id}` - Get Crystal Healing Properties

## Dreams - `roxy.Dreams`

Dream interpretation API with a 2,000+ symbol dream dictionary and psychological meanings covering animals, objects,...

- `getDailyDreamSymbol` - POST `/dreams/daily` - Get daily dream symbol
- `searchDreamSymbols` - GET `/dreams/symbols` - List and search dream symbols
- `getSymbolLetterCounts` - GET `/dreams/symbols/letters` - Get symbol counts by letter
- `getRandomSymbols` - GET `/dreams/symbols/random` - Get random dream symbols
- `getDreamSymbol` - GET `/dreams/symbols/{id}` - Get dream symbol details

## Angel Numbers - `roxy.AngelNumbers`

Angel numbers API with meanings for 111, 222, 333, 444, 555, 666, 777, 888, 999, 1111, and 75+ sequences covering eve...

- `getDailyAngelNumber` - POST `/angel-numbers/daily` - Daily Angel Number
- `analyzeNumberSequence` - GET `/angel-numbers/lookup` - Analyze Any Number Sequence
- `listAngelNumbers` - GET `/angel-numbers/numbers` - List All Angel Numbers
- `getAngelNumber` - GET `/angel-numbers/numbers/{number}` - Get Angel Number Meaning

## Location and Timezone - `roxy.Location`

City search and geocoding API with 23,000+ cities across 240+ countries, returning latitude, longitude, IANA timezone...

- `listCountries` - GET `/location/countries` - List all countries - ISO codes and city coverage
- `getCitiesByCountry` - GET `/location/countries/{iso2}` - Get cities in a country - Geocoding directory sorted by population
- `searchCities` - GET `/location/search` - Search cities worldwide - Geocoding autocomplete with coordinates and timezone

## Usage - `roxy.Usage`

Monitor your API usage, check rate limits, and track request consumption

- `getUsageStats` - GET `/usage` - Get API usage statistics

## Languages - `roxy.Languages`

List the response languages accepted by the `lang` query parameter on every i18n-aware endpoint

- `listLanguages` - GET `/languages` - List supported response languages
<!-- END:METHODS -->
